name: P01a — Pre-Router · Confirmação · v1.0
description: Sub-workflow chamado pelo Master Secretária. Detecta resposta do paciente à confirmação diária (sim/cancelar/reagendar), atualiza appointments.status, responde via Chatwoot e envia push pro médico. v2: fix LATERAL+COALESCE nos lookups.

parameters.query:
=SELECT
  COALESCE(m.id, 0) AS id,
  m.created_at,
  CASE WHEN m.id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS has_recent
FROM (VALUES (1)) AS dummy(d)
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT id, created_at
  FROM public.n8n_historico_mensagens
  WHERE session_id = '{{ $('When Called').item.json.patient_phone }}'
    AND created_at > now() - interval '18 hours'
    AND message::text ILIKE '%confirm%'
    AND message::text ILIKE '%"ai"%'
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) m ON true

=SELECT
  COALESCE(a.id::text, '') AS id,
  COALESCE(a.doctor_name, '') AS doctor_name,
  a.appointment_date,
  COALESCE(a.status, '') AS status,
  COALESCE(a.patient_name, 'Paciente') AS patient_name,
  CASE WHEN a.id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS has_appointment
FROM (VALUES (1)) AS dummy(d)
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT id, doctor_name, appointment_date, status, patient_name
  FROM public.appointments_detailed
  WHERE patient_phone = '{{ $('When Called').item.json.patient_phone }}'
    AND appointment_date BETWEEN now() AND now() + interval '48 hours'
    AND status = 'scheduled'
  ORDER BY appointment_date ASC
  LIMIT 1
) a ON true

=UPDATE public.appointments
SET status = 'confirmed', updated_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Classify Intent').item.json.appointment_id }}'
RETURNING id, status

value.mensagem: Combinado! 💜 Sua consulta está confirmada. Te esperamos no horário marcado. Qualquer imprevisto é só me avisar por aqui.
